title: THE LAST BOXES
subtitle: The Apartment · 2:14 PM · Saturday
epigraph_upright: A small afternoon. Reed has been here for an hour. The boxes are mostly packed. The painting on the easel is two-thirds done. The diner is busy downstairs but the apartment is quiet. The afternoon is finite, but generously so.
epigraph_reversed: The afternoon happens around you. Reed packs alone. The painting stays two-thirds done. Sasha is in the apartment but not in the room.
scene_description: Saturday afternoon. Reed at the boxes. The bus kid downstairs has two coffees that John sent up. The neighbor upstairs might come down to borrow a burner. The painting is on the easel.
direction_hint: Get SYNC to 5. Connect with 3 visitors (Reed counts). Leap with Reed at the same threshold.
opening_log_lines: reed is at the boxes pile. they look up when you come in.
the kettle is on. you don't remember putting it on.
the diner's call bell is muffled through the floor.

stagnation_thresholds.label: the silence in the room is the wrong silence.
reed has been quiet for too long.
the boxes are stacking faster than the room can hold.

doubt_thresholds.label: sasha at the kitchen counter, fresh coffee.
the things they want to say are jumbled.

notes: Easy-mode Lovers. Reed at the boxes from start. Bus kid drops by; neighbor might come down. SYNC requirement is 5. Reed must be at your threshold when you leap (sets lovers_synced_leap flag — the achievement fires).
ambient_pool: the diner's call bell rings, distinct, two floors down.
the record on the turntable is the one you used to listen to together.
